message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync from v0.1.1 to v0.2.0 across conformance and runtime crates

Updates the asupersync dependency version constraint from 0.1.1 to 0.2.0
in both fj-conformance and fj-runtime Cargo.toml files. This picks up the
latest published asupersync release which includes cross-platform fixes
and API improvements. The local path references are preserved for
workspace-level resolution during development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
